sources.cleaned_content:
# Q2M PPF RENEW

## Exterior / maintenance

### Innovative PPF cleaner and renewer.

Q²M PPF Renew is a dedicated maintenance product designed to clean, refresh and protect paint protection film. It combines light abrasives with protective additives to remove haze and oxidation while restoring a smooth and glossy finish.

![Product Image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2018/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2mppfrenew_120_1000_2024-1024x991.png)

## Innovational PPF cleaner and renewer.

The formula cleans deeply into the porous structure of PPF, removing bonded contamination that dulls the surface over time. Light abrasive particles restore clarity and gloss without damaging the film, including modern self healing PPF. The silica infused composition enhances slickness, improves UV resistance and adds chemical protection, while leaving a clean surface ready for further protection if required.

- LOW DUST
- NO SILICONES
- NO FILLERS

### What makes Q2M PPF RENEW so special?

- Restores gloss and smoothness to contaminated PPF
- Removes haze and oxidation safely

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![Technical Image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mppfrenew.webp)

CAPACITIES: 120 ML / 1000 ML

Consumption: 60ml / car

## HOW TO USE

1. Wash and dry the surface thoroughly.
2. Apply a small amount of product to an applicator or polishing pad.
3. Work the surface by hand or machine using light pressure.
4. Wipe residue away with a clean microfibre towel.
5. Repeat if needed on heavily affected areas.

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

**What is Q²M PPF Renew designed for?**
Cleaning, refreshing and protecting paint protection film.

**Can it be used on self healing PPF?**
Yes, it is safe for all modern PPF, including self healing films.

**Does it contain fillers or silicones?**
No, it contains no fillers and no silicones.

**Can it be applied by machine?**
Yes, it can be applied by hand or machine.

**What does it leave behind after use?**
A smooth, glossy finish with added UV and chemical protection.

sources.page_title: Gyeon PPF Renew - 120 ml - Detailed Image
sources.cleaned_content:
# Gyeon PPF Renew - 120 ml

![Product Image](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-PPF-Renew-120-ml_1849_1_m_2325.jpg)

Price: $17.99

### Available Sizes

- 120 ml - $17.99 ($0.15 / ml)
- 1000 ml - $79.99 ($0.08 / ml)

Quantity Discount: 2+ units at $16.99 (6% savings)

### Product Information

- Clean, polish and protect your PPF!
- Safely cleans away embedded contamination
- Polishes away light imperfections
- Leaves behind a protective layer of silica
- Product Codes: GY-4603, GY-4658

### Product Description

Gyeon PPF Renew is an all-in-one product designed to help you polish and protect your Paint Protection Film (aka PPF)! PPF is designed to help you protect your paint and it does an amazing job at that. However, even though it protects so well PPF can still become dirty and dull over time. Renew is designed to clean, polish and protect your PPF in one step. This formula is packed with very fine abrasives to help remove imperfections and bonded contamination deep in the pores of the PPF, restoring the initial slickness and smooth feel of the film. After use, you will be left behind with a protective, self-cleaning layer of silica designed for high repellency, UV protection, and gloss! It's the ultimate all in one product for PPF! If you are looking to polish, clean and protect your PPF, the Gyeon PPF Renew is a great choice!

Manufacturer Estimates Consumption: 60ml / car
Manufacturer Estimates Durability: Up To 8 months

### Professional Detailer Reviews

Think of PPF Renew as a facial scrub. What does a facial scrub do? It cleans out the pores and removes deep-lying dirt and oil while also being gentle enough not to irritate the skin. PPF Renew does the same thing, it removes contaminantes like tar, hard water spots and road film when a simple wash method won't suffice.

### Videos

- GYEON PPF MAINTENANCE SYSTEM (YouTube: 8MMQYpfvJSQ)
- GYEON Q M PPF Renew (YouTube: i0iuyUcQ2dM)

### From The Label

**Product Description:**
Deep cleansing and reviving effect on glossy PPF of all types. 1-step silica polish and renewer. Adds gloss and depth. Restores the smoothness of the film. Removes light mark and hazing. Leaves a slick, silica based protective layer.

**Directions:**
Apply with an eccentric machine polisher and a soft finishing pad on minimum revs. Work until only a light haze remains. Polish with a soft microfibre towel until full gloss.

### Customer Reviews

100% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 2 ratings)

**Review by Tim S. (2/6/2025) - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes**
This Gyron PPF renew is easy to exploit for outstanding results. I have 10k miles and 5 yrs of Clearbra PPF on my black M2. Despite being overly attentive to my car washing strategies, 2-bucket wash with Foam Cannon and heated forced air dryer, I had forever water spots of various sizes. With my orbital pneumatic buffer, low rpm setting and new pad, it was truly extraordinary how quickly and easily this product annihilated ALL my water spots, leaving the PPF crystal clear. Seriously, it is amazing and my car looks wet and brand new. (Leatherque for any leather, you will love the results). Perfect products, unequivocally perfect.

**Review by Patrick E. (6/28/2024) - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes**
PPF Renew works great on reviving faded PPF. I find that I am more successful using it by hand than with a machine. If I use a polisher on the lowest setting, paired with the softest/finishing pad, it tends to leave trails. I would then have to go back and buff it out by hand.

# GYEON Q²M PPF Renew

![Product Image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/3debd8c7-de91-4a68-b587-8a7644fab9b1.png?v=1638490963&width=1800)
![Product Image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/productmain_1700x1645px_Q2MPPFRewnew_1000_120ml_2021_9461d8a6-582c-42c4-9ef5-2d5662d35c98.png?v=1633626500&width=1800)
![Product Image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/Q2M_PFF_Renew_1000ml_3000px_4e7956af-b296-4573-bc15-1609c8f246da.jpg?v=1633626455&width=1800)

Price: $22.00 CAD (120ml) / $110.00 CAD (1L)

Brand: Gyeon

Barcode (120ml): 8809432674603
Barcode (1L): 8809432674658

3%+ Discount with 3+ of the Same Item

## SiO² infused PPF maintenance

Q²M PPF Renew is the world's first SiO² infused paint protection film maintenance product. Containing silica, not only does it restore gloss and slickness, it also does provide great UV protection and chemical resistance. It is also a very good base prior to a ceramic coating of your choice.

Even high quality, self-healing paint protection film becomes contaminated, dull and changes its initial smoothness over time. Gyeon Q²M PPF Renew brings a remedy to that. With its light abrasive properties, it is able to dramatically improve the level of gloss. The cleaning action of the product allows the removal of bonded contamination deep in the porous structure, restoring the initial slickness and smooth feel of the film.

![Product in use](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ppf-renew-square-pic.webp?v=1737223857&width=1080)
![Product in use](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ppf-renew-vertical-pic.webp?v=1737223857&width=1080)
![Product in use](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ppf-renew.webp?v=1737223934&width=2400)

### PPF Defect Remover + UV Protection

Maintaining paint protection film has never been that easy. Q²M PPF Renew combines light abrasive particles with protective (and repellent) additives, creating a UV resistant effect. The product allows both machine and hand application, removing haze and oxidation while leaving a smooth, glossy finish. It is the world's first maintenance product containing silica and designed from scratch to work at its best on all types of PPF, including modern self-healing films.

### PRO TIPS

An all-in-one product for maintenance and sealing of glossy PPF. Once used by hand, Q²M PPF Renew will provide excellent cleaning abilities with a protective result. Machine use is recommended with an eccentric machine on minimum to medium revs and will add fantastic gloss to the end result. TIP: Never overheat the PPF while polishing. We highly recommend the use of our Q²M Eccentric Polish pad with a suitable machine. Apply a layer of Q² CanCoat to increase hydrophobicity.

## Description

### GYEON PPF Renew - Advanced quartz technology combined with user friendly characteristics

Maintaining paint protection film has never been that easy. Q²M PPF Renew combines light abrasive particles with protective (and repellent) additives, creating resistant and highly self cleaning finish. The product allows both machine and hand application, removing haze and oxidation while leaving a smooth, glossy and repellent finish. It is the world's first maintenance product containing silica and designed from scratch to work at its best on all types of PPF, including modern self healing films.

### BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

An all-in-one product for maintenance and sealing of glossy PPF. Once used by hand, Q²M PPF Renew will provide excellent cleaning abilities with a protective result. Machine use is recommended with an eccentric machine on minimum to medium revs and will add fantastic gloss to the end result. TIP: Never overheat the PPF while polishing. We highly recommend the use of our Q²M Eccentric Polish pad with a suitable machine.

CONSUMPTION: 60ml / car
DURABILITY: up to 8 months
BEADING: 5/5
SELF-CLEANING: 5/5

### SiO2 INFUSED PPF MAINTENANCE

Q²M PPF Renew is the world's first SiO² infused paint protection film maintenance product. Containing silica, not only does it restore gloss and slickness, it also does provide great repellency combined with UV and chemical resistance.

### SLICK & GLOSSY

Even high quality, self healing paint protection film becomes contaminated, dull and changes its initial smoothness over time. Gyeon Q²M PPF Renew brings a remedy to that. With its light abrasive properties, it is able to dramatically improve the level of gloss. The cleaning action of the product allows the removal of bonded contamination deep in the porous structure, restoring the initial slickness and smooth feel of the film.

### FAQ

**Can I apply PPF Renew by hand?**
Yes, you can apply and polish GYEON PPF Renew by hand to remove light defects such as etched bug guts and water spots. However, a polisher will be required to remove swirl marks.

**PPF Renew can be used to recover lost slickness and beading?**
Yes, PPF Renew can be used to restore lost slickness and hydrophobicity. However, it is an "all-in-one" product and will not perform as effectively as dedicated PPF maintenance products, such as GYEON PPF Coating or PPF Maintain, when it comes to hydrophobic properties.

**Does it offer UV protection?**
Yes, GYEON PPF Renew provides UV protection. UV blockers are essential to prevent the film (or the adhesive that secures the film to the paint) from turning yellow.

**The all-in-one properties sound great, can I use this on paint as well?**
You can, but only for very fine jeweling purposes. The main difference between a PPF polish and a paint polish is that PPF polishes are much gentler and contain more lubricating liquids. This helps the polishing pad glide more easily on the grabby surface of PPF during the polishing stage.

**Anything else I need to know?**
Check out the video here (https://youtu.be/C-NvIYb8sNo?si=izJV_v_vYTOPIRhd) to see it in action.

# Gyeon Q2M PPF Renew 120 ml

![Product Image](//themicrofibershop.com/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Q2M_PPF_Renew.jpg?v=1756373552&width=1946)
![Product Image](//themicrofibershop.com/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Q2M_PPF_Renew_120_ml.jpg?v=1751367653&width=1946)

Price: Rs. 869.00

Status: Sold out

## Q2M PPF Renew

### Advanced ceramic technology combined with user friendly characteristics

"Is your paint protection film losing its luster, becoming dull and contaminated over time? Restore its original brilliance and protection with GYEON Q²M PPF Renew, the world's first SiO2 infused maintenance product designed specifically for PPF. This innovative formula effortlessly removes haze and oxidation, leaving a smooth, glossy, and protected finish."

- Addresses a Specific Need: It targets the maintenance of PPF, a niche but important area.
- Highlights Innovation: It emphasizes being the "world's first SiO² infused PPF maintenance product."
- Clear Benefits: It outlines the product's ability to remove haze, oxidation, and restore gloss and slickness.
- Dual Application: It mentions both hand and machine application.
- SiO² Integration: It emphasizes the added benefits of SiO² for UV protection and chemical resistance.
- Pro Tip and Specifications: It provides valuable usage tips and technical specifications.

### Why Choose GYEON Q²M PPF Renew?

- Unmatched PPF Restoration: Specifically formulated to revive and maintain all types of PPF, including self-healing films.
- SiO² Enhanced Protection: Infused with SiO² for superior UV protection and chemical resistance, extending the life of your PPF.
- Restores Gloss and Slickness: Effectively removes bonded contaminants and oxidation, restoring the original smooth and glossy finish.
- Versatile Application: Can be applied by hand or machine, providing flexibility for different detailing preferences.
- Prepares for Coating: Serves as an excellent base for applying a ceramic coating, enhancing protection and gloss.
- User-Friendly Formula: Easy to apply and work with, delivering professional results with minimal effort.

### Key Features

- SiO² infused PPF maintenance product.
- Removes haze and oxidation.
- Restores gloss and slickness.
- Provides UV protection and chemical resistance.
- Suitable for all PPF types, including self-healing films.
- Hand or machine application.

### Pro Tip

- For machine application, use an eccentric polisher on low to medium speeds with the Q²M Eccentric Polish pad.
- Avoid overheating the PPF during machine polishing.
- Apply GYEON Q² CanCoat after using Q²M PPF Renew to enhance hydrophobicity.
- For hand application, ensure even and thorough coverage.
